first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core reasoning remains unchanged across both evaluations. Both versions identify the candidate as a strong senior engineer who lacks the specific director-level AI strategy and leadership experience required for the role. The minor variations in wording and the slight rephrasing of strengths and concerns are well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and do not alter the final assessment.
